---
title: Lots of text to test layout. Including lots of text in the very long title. Multiple words.
keywords: [one, two, three]
author:
  - name: Matti Vuorre
    corresponding: true
    orcid: 0000-0001-5052-066X
    email: mjvuorre@uvt.nl
    affiliations:
      - ref: 2
affiliations:
  - id: 2
    name: Tilburg University
    department: Department of Social Psychology
format:
  preprint-typst:
    include-before-body:
      - text: "#show <refs>: set par(hanging-indent: 1.4em)"
    theme: jou
    keep-typ: true
    citeproc: true
    wordcount: true
---

```{r}
#| echo: false

x <- rnorm(10)
```

---
abstract: |
  {{< lipsum 1 >}}
---

# Introduction

{{< lipsum 3 >}}

## Detail

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

# Method

{{< lipsum 5 >}}

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
